subcodes.first_line: O thou upon whom God bestoweth His mercy as He willeth! The gates are barred, and hence correspondence is suspended, as Khwajeh Hafiz sayeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من یختص الله برحمته من یشاء ابواب مسدود لهذا مکاتبه موقوف بقول خواجه حافظ
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
